name: Ambrosia Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in hot water. Let cool for a few minutes.
2. Add the dissolved gelatin to the cake mix with all other ingredients. Mix for about 2 minutes on medium speed.
3. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9 x 2 1/2 inch pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 45 minutes.
5. For the frosting, combine the crushed pineapple with powdered sugar until well mixed. Spread the mixture over the hot cake.
6. Sprinkle coconut over the pineapple.
7. Decorate the top of the cake with five sections of Mandarin oranges arranged in a circle and a maraschino cherry placed in the center.
